title: Two More Sizes
description: A mod that adds variants of some existing mobs.
body:
![Two More Sizes Mod Title Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3347822b5d68d884a0bd4d79f3829a6b4bb2c5e3_0.webp)
## Two More Sizes Mod
The TwoMoreSizes Mod adds new variants of some existing mobs, specifically mini and/or mega versions. The goal is to enhance the gameplay experience by introducing balanced mobs that stay true to the vanilla style.

## Mobs
### Miniblaze:
- Spawns in Nether Wastes, Crimson Forest, Basalt Deltas.
- Drops: Blazepowder.
- Shots the player with firecharges.

### Megablaze:
- Spawns in Nether Wastes.
- Drops: Blazepowder, Skull Fragment.
- Shots the player with firecharges and fireballs.
- Can summon Miniblaze.
- If its Health is low, the power of its fireballs grow.

### Minighast:
- Spawns in Soulsand Valley, Warped Forest.
- Drops: Gunpowder, Tentacle.
- Shots the player, dealing damage and giving Slowness.

### Megaghast:
- Spawns in Soulsand Valley.
- Drops Gunpowder, Cursed Tear, Cursed Hair.
- Shots the player with a cursed fireball, wich explosion generate a Blindness area.
- Requires 3 reflected fireballs to be killed in that way.

### Minienderman:
- Spawns in End Barrens, End Midlands, End Highlands.
- Drops: Ender Powder.
- Shots the player from the distance.
- It get triggered when attacked. This will also trigger the others Minienerman in the area. It cannot teleport himself.

### Megaenderman:
- Spawns in End Highlands.
- Drops: Enderpearl, Ender Will Fragment, Endstone, Chorus Fruit.
- It can teleport to the player, and physically attack him.
- It get triggered when attacked, or if looked in the eye. It can orders to Enderman and Minienderman in the area to attack the target (not all of theme are going to be triggered).

## Blocks and Items
### Megablaze Skull Fragment
- It get dropped by the Megablaze, and can be use in a furnace for smelting items.

### Cursed Fire Charges:
- Can be shoot with a Megablaze Cannon.

### Ender Charges:
- Can be shoot with a Megablaze Cannon, allowing the user to teleport after the explosion.

### Megablaze Cannon:
- It allows the player to shot fireballs with a 15 sec cooldown. Can shot fireballs, cursed fireballs and ender charges, but gives priority to fireballs, and cursed fireballs then.
- It comsumes firecharges/cursed firecharges/ender charges.

### Blindness Potion:
- Blindness Potion can be distillated by a Cursed Ghast Tear.
- Splash and Lingering versions as well.

### Cursed Dried Kelp:
- Gives at the player Slowness and Blindness, if it has nither of theme.
- Gives at the player Slowness and removes Blindness, if it is effected by Blindness.
- Gives at the player Blindness and removes Slowness, if it is effected by Sloness.
- Clears Blindness and Slowness effect, if the player is affected by both.

### Ender Will Staff:
- It allows the player to summon 2 Ender Holograms, which will defend him from hostile mobs for 10 sec.
- It consumes an Ender Will Fragment from the inventory.

### End Ruins:
- A little structure that spawns in End Highlands. Can spawn with a chest.
- Possible loot: 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Endstone
- Endstone Bricks
- Purpur Blocks
- Chorus Fruit
- Enderpearl
- Exp. Potion
- Diamonds (rare)
- Ender Will Fragment (rare)

</details>



### Decoratives blocks:
- Megablaze, Megaghast and Megaenderman 2x2 paints.
- 7 decorative blocks.
- Each of them emits a different type of particles once powered with redstone.
